story.title: Built with intent.
story.paragraph1: My name is Claudiu, I'm 30 years old, based in Constanța, Romania. My passion for IT started in childhood and, over time, became a clear direction: to build efficient, well-thought-out solutions.
story.paragraph2: I've been learning constantly — through self-study and hands-on practice — focused on real outcomes, not just theory. For me, every project is more than execution: it means attention to detail, structure, and the intent to deliver something that actually works.
story.paragraph3: This portfolio reflects how I work: clean, clear, results-driven. If you need reliability, good communication, and real involvement in your project, I'm open to collaborate.

projects.indexLead: Three live projects — each with the story behind it: what wasn't working, what we built, what we delivered.

banciuCostin.title: Banciu Costin
banciuCostin.body: Complete site for an experienced photographer — public-facing tuned for performance, plus a custom admin panel where the client manages albums, pricing, slider, video showreel, and events.

context.body:
Banciu Costin is a photographer with a deep portfolio — years of weddings, portraits, events, and professional work. He had a WordPress site but ran into two real problems: gallery loading was slow given the image volume, and the WordPress plugin/update dependency made maintenance costly and fragile.

He wanted a product where he could add albums himself, swap the homepage slider, update pricing packages, and manage events — without touching code, without calling me for every change.

approach.body:
I built a Next.js site with a custom admin panel — a two-sided product. The public side is tuned for instant loading: lazy-loaded galleries, modern image formats, a layout that works identically on any device. The admin side is a full dashboard behind authentication — Banciu manages categories himself (Wedding, Christening, Save the Date, Couple, Family, Trash the Dress, Graduation, Professional, Fun shots), bulk photo uploads, the hero slider, video showreel, events, and pricing packages.

Every change made in the admin reflects on the site instantly. No WordPress account to maintain, no plugins to update, no developers involved in adding a new album.

result.body: Banciu Costin manages 194 photos across 9 categories himself, plus the homepage slider, the video showreel, and the service packages. He adds a new wedding album in minutes without touching code. The site loads fast on mobile even with the image volume, and the admin scales — adding a new service category is a 30-second operation.

metrics.label: Photos managed across 9 categories — all from his own admin
WordPress dependencies, plugins, or developer needed

aurasjobs.title: Aurasjobs
aurasjobs.body: Processes candidate emails automatically, generates personalized responses, manages the proposal → approval → send flow. Built for a cruise ship recruitment firm.

context.body:
The recruitment firm works with candidates for cruise ships — hundreds of applicants per month, each with a CV sent by email. Manual responses, in English, personalized per position, consumed most of the day.

They wanted a system that reads incoming emails, understands candidate intent, generates a tailored draft response, and leaves the final decision to the operator — not a bot sending autonomously.

approach.body:
AI agent with LLM for parsing and generation. Emails enter a queue, the system extracts intent (application, question, follow-up), generates a personalized draft in English based on the position and CV. The operator reviews the draft in the dashboard, adjusts if needed, approves sending.

Next.js dashboard with the propose → approve → sent flow visible in real time. All candidate data centralized, no thread lost.

result.body: The agent takes over the repetitive part of communication, the human stays in the final decision. Responses go out faster, candidates get personalized attention, operators can process more candidates in the same workday.

stereocad.title: Stereocad
stereocad.body: Auto-generates cadastral documents for a specialist firm. Passwordless magic-link auth, real-time stage monitoring, no passwords to manage.
stereocad.tech: Next.js · TypeScript · Magic Link · Document Gen

context.body:
The cadastral firm handles large volumes of documentation — standardized steps per file that previously happened manually: form filling, status tracking, generating official files. Operators lost time on admin work instead of focusing on the technical side.

On top of that, managing password accounts for a growing team meant weekly resets, unsafe sharing, friction at onboarding.

approach.body:
Next.js platform with automatic document generation based on file data. The status of each stage (submitted, in progress, delivered) visible in real time to the entire team. Passwordless authentication via magic link — the operator enters their email, receives a unique link, signs in.

No passwords to manage, no resets, no compromised accounts. Role-based permissions, audit trail on important actions, all in one place.

result.body: The team processes files faster, without admin friction. Onboarding a new operator happens through their email — no IT setup, no shared passwords. Stereocad can grow the team without proportionally growing account problems.

metrics.label: Auth via magic link, no management
Stage monitoring for the whole team
